## Problem

What operator workflow or deployment problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or other designs did you consider?

## Notes

Do not include API keys, Telegram tokens, OAuth/auth JSON, private domains, chat IDs, user IDs, or provider credentials.
